title: esql.delete_data_source

name.description: A comma-separated list of data source names to delete.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node.

timeout.description: The time to wait for the request to be completed.

description:
Delete ES|QL data sources.

Deletes one or more data sources used in ES|QL data federation.
Fails with `409` if any dataset references one of the named data sources;
delete the dependent datasets first.
